title: gladiolus × hortulanus
intro: Gladiolus × hortulanus, a popular ornamental plant, is a hybrid of the gladiolus genus and is commonly known as the garden gladiolus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gladiolus × hortulanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, wounds, and respiratory issues.
